title: Enhancing Language Model Agents using Diversity of Thoughts
reason: LLM agent framework (DoT) for code generation, reduces redundant reflections, improves pass@1 on programming benchmarks.

title: Active Task Disambiguation with LLMs
reason: Directly addresses ambiguity in NL specs for tasks, proposing active disambiguation via LLMs to improve correctness.

title: On the self-verification limitations of large language models on reasoning and planning tasks
reason: Directly studies LLM self-verification for reasoning/planning; shows external verification boosts code-like task correctness.

title: Epistemic Monte Carlo Tree Search
reason: Epistemic MCTS for code generation in SUBLEQ; uses uncertainty-guided search for program synthesis.

title: Generative Verifiers: Reward Modeling as Next-Token Prediction
reason: Proposes generative verifiers for LLM reasoning, aligns with reliability methods like verifier-guided decoding for code correctness.

title: MotherNet: Fast Training and Inference via Hyper-Network Transformers
reason: Proposes hypernetwork for in-context learning on tabular data, relevant to structured reasoning and reliability of LLM workflows.

title: Scaling LLM Test-Time Compute Optimally Can be More Effective than Scaling Parameters for Reasoning
reason: Scales test-time compute for reasoning, uses verifier reward models to improve LLM code output correctness.

title: Automatic Curriculum Expert Iteration for Reliable LLM Reasoning
reason: Addresses LLM reasoning reliability, hallucination reduction, and aligning assertiveness with capabilities for code-adjacent tasks.

title: LLM-based Typed Hyperresolution for Commonsense Reasoning with Knowledge Bases
reason: LLM integrated with logical reasoner, theory resolution for error repair/verification, connects to formal methods.

title: In-Context Editing: Learning Knowledge from Self-Induced Distributions
reason: Studies knowledge editing for LLMs, relevant to reliability and updating code-related knowledge without retraining.

title: DOTS: Learning to Reason Dynamically in LLMs via Optimal Reasoning Trajectories Search
reason: LLM reasoning with dynamic trajectory planning for code-like tasks, relates to structured reasoning workflows

title: Learning Dynamics of LLM Finetuning
reason: Analyzes LLM finetuning dynamics, explains hallucination causes; relevant to reliability/hallucination reduction for code.

title: Breaking Mental Set to Improve Reasoning through Diverse Multi-Agent Debate
reason: Multi-agent debate for LLM reasoning improvement, aligns with reliability/consensus mechanisms for correctness.

title: Better than Your Teacher: LLM Agents that learn from Privileged AI Feedback
reason: LLM agent framework (LEAP) evaluated on interactive coding tasks (Intercode Bash), improving code execution reliability.

title: PiCO: Peer Review in LLMs based on Consistency Optimization
reason: Unsupervised peer review for LLMs based on consistency; relates to consensus/abstention for reliability.

title: OCEAN: Offline Chain-of-thought Evaluation and Alignment in Large Language Models
reason: Offline KG-aligned CoT reasoning via MDP/RL; connects structured reasoning to LLM reliability.

title: Iterative Label Refinement Matters More than Preference Optimization under Weak Supervision
reason: Proposes iterative label refinement for unreliable human feedback on coding tasks, addressing reliability in LM workflows.

title: Think Thrice Before You Act: Progressive Thought Refinement in Large Language Models
reason: Progressive refinement method for LLM reasoning, improves reliability on diverse tasks.

title: Bayesian WeakS-to-Strong from Text Classification to Generation
reason: Extends Weak-to-Strong to generation with Bayesian ensembling for reliability, applicable to code generation.

title: Varying Shades of Wrong: Aligning LLMs with Wrong Answers Only
reason: Aligns LLMs using wrong-over-wrong preferences to improve calibration and correctness, a reliability mechanism.

title: Knowledge Graph Finetuning Enhances Knowledge Manipulation in Large Language Models
reason: Uses knowledge graphs to generate explanations for code-like Q&A, enhancing LLM reasoning and reliability.

title: Correlated Proxies: A New Definition and Improved Mitigation for Reward Hacking
reason: Addresses reward hacking in RLHF; relevant to reliability and alignment of LLM-generated outputs.

title: Adaptive Deployment of Untrusted LLMs Reduces Distributed Threats
reason: LLM safety for code generation via trusted model monitoring/verification, reducing subtle errors in untrusted LLMs.

title: Unveiling the Magic of Code Reasoning through Hypothesis Decomposition and Amendment
reason: Proposes RHDA pipeline for code reasoning with iterative hypothesis decomposition, tool use, and reflection to reduce hallucination.

title: Latent Space Chain-of-Embedding Enables Output-free LLM Self-Evaluation
reason: Proposes output-free self-evaluation method for LLM reliability using internal hidden state dynamics.

title: Preference Optimization for Reasoning with Pseudo Feedback
reason: Uses test cases for pseudo feedback to improve LLM code generation reliability via preference optimization.

title: Can Knowledge Editing Really Correct Hallucinations?
reason: Benchmarks knowledge editing for correcting LLM hallucinations, a core reliability mechanism.

title: Uncertainty-Aware Decoding with Minimum Bayes Risk
reason: Presents MBR decoding for uncertainty-aware generation, applicable to LLM reliability/hallucination reduction.

title: Integrative Decoding: Improving Factuality via Implicit Self-consistency
reason: Proposes self-consistency decoding method to improve factuality, relevant to reliability/hallucination reduction themes.

title: BIRD: A Trustworthy Bayesian Inference Framework for Large Language Models
reason: Proposes Bayesian framework (BIRD) for trustworthy probability estimation in LLM reasoning/planning, improving reliability.

title: Fine-tuning with Reserved Majority for Noise Reduction
reason: Presents a fine-tuning method (NoRM) that reduces noise/hallucination and improves code generation performance.
